response.overview: The second MDP video "Pocahontas" featured Noah Salasnek, Chris Roach, Nick Perata, Jon Baiocchi, and Jeff Brushie. Also, some 15yr old from Auburn, WA. named Jamie Lynn, and a 15yr old from Norway named Terje Haakonsen had their first appearance. "Pocahontas" continued the freestyle snowboarding movement as well as included some huge drops by Perata and Shaun Farmer. Years ago a Native American princess named Pocahontas roamed this place we now call America. Planet destruction and general ignorance have brought her back from the grave. She meets two of the finest snowboarders on the planet and relates an apocalyptic vision of the future to them before they embark on their tour of many snow-covered mountains.
response.title: Pocahontas
